chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-7412 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.32708/2019. 2. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 27.10.2023 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Shabbir Ahmed Shaikh, Advocate for Respondent No.1..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Since last few dates petitioner and his counsel Farhan Zia Abrar are not attending the Court. On 16.03.2023 counsel for the petitioner sought time in the matter, followed by his absence on 10.05.2023. Yet again on 30.08.2023 Mr. Shafqat Gul, Advocate held his brief and sought adjournment. Today yet again the petitioner and his counsel are called absent and there is no intimation either. The petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
